name: Superheavy Samurai Swordsman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ソード－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>９９９</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>キューキューキュー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can change its battle position. If a "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, after damage calculation: The opponent's monster's ATK and DEF become 0.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can change its battle position. If a "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, after damage calculation: The opponent's monster's ATK and DEF become 0.
eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can change its battle position. If a "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control battles an opponent's monster, after damage calculation: The opponent's monster's ATK and DEF become 0.
